ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium the team plays in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* File path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* File path to the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* List of previous teams coached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces available */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "stadium_logo" TEXT /* File path to the stadium's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ends */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the season belongs to */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  "relegated_teams" TEXT /* List of teams that got relegated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "goals_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of goals allowed */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points accumulated */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance per game */,
  "top_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top scorer */,
  "most_clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "live_scores" (
  "live_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each live score record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Current score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Current score of the second team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the live score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("live_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_live_scores_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_live_scores_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
